title: New Zealand Government Information Security (INFOSEC) Policy Framework
description: Government-wide mandatory information security requirements covering identification of information assets, design of security measures, validation through certification and accreditation, and ongoing maintenance of security controls. Establishes baseline expectations for confidentiality, integrity, and availability across all NZ government agencies.
suggested_owner: Government CISO or Security Governance Team
